Milkshake Mania Wiki
Play
Wiki / Prestige

Prestige & eternal upgrades

Prestige — called Rebrand in-game — is the first meta-progression loop in Milkshake Mania, added in v1.3. When you meet the requirements you can wipe your current run in exchange for a permanent income multiplier and a handful of prestige tokens. Tokens fund the eternal upgrades shop, a set of perks that carry forward through every future rebrand and compound with each other.

Core mechanic

Prestige (Rebrand)

Reach the required player level and hold the cash cost for your current prestige tier to unlock the Rebrand button. Your first prestige needs Level 20, and each rebrand after that asks for 2 more levels (22, then 24, and so on). The first prestige costs $100 billion, and each subsequent prestige costs 100 times more than the one before it.

Confirming a rebrand wipes your money, shops, upgrades, flavors, countries, locations, research, and staff — everything you built this run is gone. In return you receive a permanent +25% income multiplier for each prestige level and a payout of prestige tokens.

The following are kept across a rebrand and are never reset:

  • Achievements and records
  • Lifetime stats and lifetime earnings
  • Player level and XP
  • Options
  • Eternal upgrades (and your token balance)

The base prestige multiplier is +25% per prestige level — a gentle, steady reward. The real power of prestige is unlocking higher content tiers (see below) and building up eternal upgrades over many runs.

Currency

Prestige tokens

Each rebrand pays out a number of prestige tokens calculated from your lifetime gross earnings. The formula is logarithmic: the first prestige (around $100 billion lifetime) yields roughly 6 tokens, while reaching $1e27 in lifetime earnings yields roughly 54 tokens.

Tokens are awarded against your lifetime earnings watermark — the same earnings cannot be re-farmed. Only net new lifetime gross (money you have never earned before) moves the token counter upward. This means farming the same run repeatedly does not generate more tokens; you need to genuinely grow your empire further each time to earn more.

Your prestige token balance and all purchased eternal upgrades survive every rebrand. Spend freely — you will not lose them.

Price caps

Content tier-gating

Prestige does not just reward you — it unlocks content. Every item in the game has a base price, and items whose base price exceeds your current buyable price cap are locked behind a prestige requirement.

For countries and other purchasables, the price cap starts at $100 billion (prestige 0) and multiplies by 100 for each prestige level you hold. Items above your cap show a clear "Requires Prestige N" label in place of a buy button — they are visible so you can plan, but you cannot purchase them until you reach that prestige level.

Flavors are gated by rank instead: every prestige level unlocks exactly 6 new high-tier flavors (Prestige 1 opens the 6 cheapest gated flavors, Prestige 2 the next 6, and so on), ending with the six mythic-tier flavors — Meteor Marshmallow, Wormhole Walnut, Pulsar Peppermint, Comet Caramel Crunch, Asteroid Almond Fudge, and Eclipse Espresso — the endgame carrot that keeps pulling you through multiple rebrands.

Eternal upgrades reveal in waves too: two perks are available from your first rebrand, two more unlock at Prestige 1, and the final two at Prestige 2 — each shown as a locked teaser until then.

The Prestige tab is always visible and clickable, even before Level 20. While locked it shows a clear locked message so you can read your progress toward the requirement without doing anything.

Token shop

Eternal upgrades

The Prestige tab hosts the eternal upgrades shop — a set of six upgrades bought with prestige tokens that persist across every rebrand. Invest tokens here and each new run starts stronger than the last.

Upgrade Effect per level Max level Base token cost
Prestige Power +10% permanent income 10 1
Eternal Blender +15% global income (always active) 10 2
Head Start Begin every run with $10,000 extra cash per level 10 1
Stocked Pantry Begin every run with +1 supply capacity level per level 5 1
Efficient Kitchen −5% ingredient consumption per blend per level 5 2
Token Tycoon +10% prestige tokens earned per level 5 2

Each upgrade's token cost doubles with each level purchased (Token Tycoon triples instead). Plan your spending: earlier levels of any upgrade are cheap, but the final levels are a significant investment. Prestige Power and Eternal Blender both raise your income multiplier directly on top of the base +25%/prestige — they stack additively with each other and multiplicatively with everything else.
